ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT main.object_order_id AS "ç”łčľĽID"
   FROM (((t_object_order main
     JOIN t_object_analysis suba ON ((suba.analysis_id = main.latest_analysis_id)))
     JOIN m_customer_settings subb ON ((subb.customer_id = main.builder_id)))
     JOIN t_object_order_sub subc ON ((subc.object_order_id = main.object_order_id)))
  WHERE ((main.active_flg = 1) AND (subb.jyuan_flg = 1) AND (suba.analysis_complete_date >= subb.jyuan_apply_start_date));
